metadata.description: Claude Code skill for designing, cloning, and reusing voices via VoxCPM2

plugins.name: voxcpm-voice
plugins.description: Design any voice from text OR clone an existing voice from an audio clip. Save to a local library, then generate voicelines / narration via Ultimate Cloning. Steer delivery with Controllable Cloning directives. YAML batches for VO banks. Project scaffolding for in-project output. Cross-platform (macOS/Linux/Windows) with automatic CUDA detection.
